title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues that the invention of a theory equivalent to General Relativity represents the final test of AI capabilities. This frames scientific theory generation and discovery as the ultimate benchmark for artificial general intelligence.
